privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying the official OpenToonz sample animation 'dwanko_run.tnz'. The task output is verified against an expected output directory '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/alien_variant'. The agent must render at least 10 frames. The evaluation script checks if the rendered images contain a target Teal color with RGB values of (0, 255, 255) using a color tolerance of 30, which contradicts the metadata claim of 20.
